entities.name: Sona
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro te, Sona, per hoc nomen domini: Tetragramaton, et per hoc nomen dei: loth, et per hoc nomen dei: Nabnoth...

entities.name: Discobermath

attributes.role: named among spirits to open in conjuration

entities.raw_quote: Vos demones ab oriente,- vos demones ab occidente, vos demones ab meridie, vos demones a septentrione, aperite nobis, Discobermath, Archidemath, Fritath...

entities.name: Puer (boy)
entities.raw_quote: Sit puer infra xij annos existens. Et post mane et in crepusculo noctis, circulum protrahendo...

entities.name: virgo iuvenis (young virgin)
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro te, virgo iuvenis, per deum verum Basvon, et per nomen On, Berion, Sabaoth, Adonav...

entities.name: spatula arietis dextram (right shoulder blade of ram)
entities.raw_quote: accipe spatulam arietis dextram, oleo oliue invnctam, quam ponendo super manubrium cultelli, inspiciat puer- virgo.

entities.name: candelabrum (candle)
entities.raw_quote: Tu vero ex alia parte, tenendo candelam accensam, dicas hoc modo...

entities.name: sator arepo (sator arepo square)
entities.raw_quote: Sator, arepo, tenet, opera, rotas. In nomine Patris et Filij et Spiritus Sancti. Amen.

entities.name: bacimine (basin)
entities.raw_quote: Incipit ars verissima de bacimine...

entities.name: resina alba (white resin)

attributes.preparation: melted over candle onto stone, collected as powder

entities.raw_quote: Accipe resinam albam quam accendes per candelam super lapidem aliquem planum sub pelui desuper aliquantulum eleuata...

entities.name: oleum oliue (olive oil)
entities.raw_quote: primo in oleo oliue, et linies inferiores quatuor articulos sinistre manus pueri masculi virginis.

entities.name: pulvis (powder)
entities.raw_quote: colligas in pergamen[t]o aliquo uel corio albo puluerem ilium adherentem pelui ex vaporacione resine predicte...

entities.name: Bethala, Pamelon, Anguis, Floris, Ereth, Alya, Cabyona, Ely, Eloy, Sadamay, Melgry, Asmyacre

attributes.role: twelve spirits to appear in boy’s hand

entities.raw_quote: Bethala, Pamelon, Anguis, Floris, Ereth, 3 Alya, Cabyona, Ely, Eloy, Sadamay, Melgry, Asmyacre, intretis in nomine domini.

entities.name: Carab, Riasteli, Careb, Basal, Mistal, Oronothel, Fabanin, Non, Va, Vatuel

attributes.role: named in ear of boy to appear in basin

entities.raw_quote: Hec nomina dices in aurem pueri virginis: Carab, Riasteli, Careb, Basal, Mistal, Oronothel, Fabanin, Non, Va, Vatuel.

entities.name: Caspar, Balthasar, Melchior
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro vos per tres reges, Caspar, Balthasar, Melchior...

entities.name: Sydrac, Misac, Abdenago

attributes.role: Three Holy Children invoked in conjurations

entities.raw_quote: Coniuro vos per tres pueros Sydrac, Misac, Abdenago...

entities.name: Abiniabyndo, Abyncola, Abracalos, Pyel, Thyel, Syel
entities.raw_quote: Abiniabyndo, Abyncola, Abracalos, Pyel, Thyel, Syel.

entities.name: Ely, Eloe, Sabaoth, Adonay, Elyon, On
entities.raw_quote: ...per hec sancta nomina tua: Ely, Eloe, Sabaoth, Adonay, Elyon, On...

entities.name: Tetragramaton
entities.raw_quote: per hoc nomen domini: Tetragramaton...

entities.name: Alpha et O
entities.raw_quote: ...qui est Alpha et O, primus et nouissimus...

entities.name: Elthie
entities.raw_quote: per sanctum nomen dei Elthie...

entities.name: Ely, Elov, Eloem
entities.raw_quote: ...Ihesu Christi: Ely, Elov, Eloem...

entities.name: Pantocrator
entities.raw_quote: Sic in MS, for Pantocrator?

entities.name: On, Orion, Sabaoth, Adonay
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro te, virgo iuvenis, per deum On, Orion, Sabaoth, Adonay...

entities.name: Basvon
entities.raw_quote: per deum verum Basvon...

entities.name: Messyas, Soter, Emanuel, Pancraton, Occinomos
entities.raw_quote: ...nomen domini: Messyas, Soter, Emanuel, Pancraton, Occinomos, Tetragramaton...

entities.name: Agyos, Otheos, Athanatos, Yschiros, Kirios, Alleluia, Eleyson
entities.raw_quote: ...Agyos, Otheos, Athanatos, Yschiros, Kirios, Alleluia, Eleyson...

entities.name: Jesus Nazarenus
entities.raw_quote: ...Jesus Nazarenus, Messyas, Sother, Emanuel, Fords, Fons, Leo, Petra...

entities.name: Fords, Fons, Leo, Petra
entities.raw_quote: ...Fords, Fons, Leo, Petra...

entities.name: Cedon, Zephata, Eloym, Eloyay

attributes.role: named spirits to appear in boy’s palm

entities.raw_quote: [...] Cedon, Zephata, Eloym, Eloyay, venite et apparete in vngwe istius pueri sub forma Humana...

entities.name: Rabuel, Astena, Hytatol

attributes.role: named among spirits to obey conjurer

entities.raw_quote: Rabuel, Astena, Hytatol, cogitate facere voluntatem meam per predictas potestates.

entities.name: Gospar, Dasper, Gespar, Lapir, Sparsis, Nota, Caliusf Asper
entities.raw_quote: Gospar, Dasper, Gespar, Lapir, Sparsis, Nota, Caliusf Asper.

entities.name: Britonia, Bresis, Diton, Crasis, Sanete, Garbamion
entities.raw_quote: Britonia, Bresis, Diton, Crasis, Sanete, Garbamion, libera nos famulos ab omni malo.

entities.name: A, Q, O, P, E, V

attributes.function: characters to be inscribed on pelu (stone slab)

entities.raw_quote: Karacteres isti [5Or] scribendi sunt vt infra docetur: A, Q,- O, P, E, V.

entities.name: pelu (stone slab)

attributes.function: surface for resin incense and inscribed characters

entities.raw_quote: ...super pelui desuper aliquantulum eleuata...antequam ipsa resina sub ipsa pelui accenditur.

entities.name: cingulum sacerdotalis (priest’s girdle)
entities.raw_quote: ...cum cingulo sacerdotali et stola dedicata liget eum in modum crucis circumquaque...

entities.name: stola (stole)
entities.raw_quote: ...cum cingulo sacerdotali et stola dedicata liget eum in modum crucis circumquaque...

entities.name: liber consecracionum (Book of Consecrations)
entities.raw_quote: ab omni pollucione mentis et corporis se debet abstinere in cibo [et] potu...nouem diebus ante opus inceptum...

summary: This chunk contains detailed ritual instructions for spirit conjuration using child seers (puer/virgo), including scrying on ram’s shoulder blade and basin, binding spirits by divine names (Tetragramaton, Alpha et O, Elthie), and invoking angelic hierarchies. It lists numerous spirit names (e.g., Discobermath, Bethala, Carab) and ritual ingredients (resin, olive oil, incense). Also includes the prologue to the Liber consecracionum, outlining purification requirements for practitioners.

Vos demones ab oriente,- vos demones ab occidente, vos demones ab meridie, vos demones a septentrione, aperite nobis, Discobermath, Archidemath, Fritath...

Hec nomina dices in aurem pueri virginis: Carab, Riasteli, Careb, Basal, Mistal, Oronothel, Fabanin, Non, Va, Vatuel.
